description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the $DOCKER_BUILD_IMAGE variable (tmaier/docker-compose:18.06) as the Docker image with a docker:dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER and DOCKER_HOST variables. Define a build stage containing jobs named build:build-docker:dark-sky, build:build-docker:elasticsearch, build:build-docker:geomar-wetter, build:build-docker:grafana, build:build-docker:kiel-opendata, build:build-docker:kiel-parkhaeuser, build:build-docker:kiel-photos, build:build-docker:luftdaten-info, build:build-docker:orion-grafana-proxy, build:build-docker:prometheus, build:build-docker:ratsprotokolle, build:build-docker:ship-data-ais-forwarder, build:build-docker:ship-data-provider, and build:build-docker:swkielnetz-iot; each runs only on tag pipelines, executes `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $REGISTRY`, then `docker-compose build <service>` and `docker-compose push <service>`. Add a deploy stage with a deploy:integration job that runs on tags, uses the kroniak/ssh-client:3.6 image, sets DEPLOYMENT_SERVER to $INTEGRATION_SERVER, and runs `source deploy.sh integration` to deploy to https://integration.kiel-data-hub.de/. Add a deploy:production job that also runs on tags, uses the same ssh-client image, sets DEPLOYMENT_SERVER to $PRODUCTION_SERVER, runs `source deploy.sh production`, targets https://app.kiel-data-hub.de/, and is triggered manually. No caches or artifacts are defined.
